member.name: T:EvmHookCall
member.summary:
Specifies details of a call to an EVM hook.

This class represents the evm_hook_call field in the HookCall protobuf message. It contains the call data and gas limit for executing an EVM hook.

member.name: M:EvmHookCall.#ctor(System.Byte[],System.UInt64)
member.param: the call data to pass to the hook via the IHieroHook.HookContext#data field
the gas limit to use for the hook execution

member.name: M:EvmHookCall.Clone
member.summary: Get the call data for this hook call.
member.returns: the call data as a byte array

member.name: P:EvmHookCall.GasLimit
member.summary: Get the gas limit for this hook call.

member.name: M:EvmHookCall.ToProtobuf
member.summary: Convert this EvmHookCall to a protobuf message.

member.name: M:EvmHookCall.FromProtobuf(Proto.EvmHookCall)
member.summary: Create an EvmHookCall from a protobuf message.
